paragraph:
# Velmoria and the refugees

*Two hundred and fifteen years on, a flood of the desperate at the border tests whether a republic's values extend beyond itself*

LET THIS chapter look outward. Two hundred and fifteen years after the marshal fell, Velmoria faced a test it had long been spared: a neighboring state had fallen to a new (juggernaut) of tyranny, and a (slew) of refugees—fleeing what foreign correspondents called, (devout)ly wishing they were wrong, a slow-motion (holocaust)—massed at Velmoria's frontier. The republic, which had spent two centuries perfecting freedom at home, now had to decide whether its values could (subsist) beyond its own borders.

The crisis came like a (cloudburst). The neighboring (protagonist) of the disaster was a familiar type—an (egotist) and (narcissist), a (juggernaut) of ambition who had managed to (oust) a fragile government and (thrust) himself to power. He was no (conformist) but the worst kind of (nonconformist): a (hedonist) despot who ruled by (lust) and (disgust), draping his tyranny in the (august) language of national renewal. His subjects, faced with (curfew) and terror, had begun to (withdraw) what little they owned and flee—a (gust) of humanity blown toward Velmoria's (nethermost) frontier.

The refugees gathered in a sprawling camp where the two nations (abut)—a (roundabout) maze of muddy lanes and canvas (hut)s, a (jigsaw) of the displaced. They came with little: a (numismatist)'s tin of old coins, a (philatelist)'s ruined album, an (amethyst) ring on a grandmother's (wrist). They had (subsist)ed on the (crust) of charity and the (marrow) of hope. They did not (accost) the border guards or (tout) their grievances to the cameras; the (callow)est children (pout)ed at the closed gate while the (stout) elders simply waited, all of them hoping to (know) whether Velmoria would (bestow) refuge or (disavow) them.

The debate inside Velmoria was fierce. A (defeatist) faction urged the republic to (withdraw) into itself—to (eschew) the burden, close the border, and let the refugees (subsist) as they could. They were no (extremist)s, they insisted, merely realists: the republic could not (endow) every fleeing soul with a home without straining its own (sinew). To take them in was to risk a (glut) the system could not (adjust) to absorb. Better, they argued, to (winnow) the deserving from the rest, and admit only a trickle, letting the rest lie (fallow) at the border.

The opposing faction made its case with equal force. To turn away the desperate, they argued, would be to (disavow) the republic's deepest (precept). What was Velmoria's two-century (quest) for freedom worth if it could not (hallow) that freedom by sharing it? To (eschew) the refugees was to let the neighboring (juggernaut) (overshadow) Velmoria's own values—to let fear (skew) the republic toward the very (callow) cruelty its founders had (overthrow)n. They were not (highbrow) idealists or (callow) (optimist)s; they simply held that a republic which would not (enlist) its strength for the persecuted had begun to rot at the (marrow).

Recall how the marshal had treated the desperate. He had made refugees of his own people, driven them to flee his (holocaust) of cruelty. He would (accost) the fleeing at the border, (rout) them with (gust)s of violence, and (oust) the inconvenient into the (nethermost) wastes. He had no (sinew) of compassion, only the (lust) of an (egotist) and the (disgust) of a (narcissist) for any weakness not his own. To him, the suffering of others was a (sideshow)—at most a (woodcut) illustration for his propaganda, never a claim on his conscience.

The republic, (chasten)ed by that memory, refused both the (defeatist)'s closed gate and the (callow) (optimist)'s open flood. It would neither (eschew) its values nor pretend the burden was weightless. Through long, (impromptu) debate—no (guru)'s easy answer, no (highbrow) formula—it forged a workable course. It would admit the refugees, but in an orderly way: to (winnow) not the deserving from the undeserving (all were deserving) but to (adjust) the flow so that the republic's (sinew) was not (exhaust)ed past breaking. It would (endow) the camp with real aid, (enlist) volunteers, and (bestow) on each refugee the chance to (subsist) and, in time, to belong.

The plan was no (anticlimax). The republic threw its (know-how) into the effort. A (podiatrist) and a (taxonomist)-turned-medic tended the sick; a (pugilist) of a logistics officer organized the (overflow); a (percussionist) and a (vocalist) gave impromptu concerts to (glow)ing crowds of weary children. The (fallow) fields near the camp were enriched with (compost) and planted; the refugees, given dignity rather than (disgust), began to (sow) crops and rebuild. What had threatened to be a (juggernaut) of catastrophe became, by patient (know-how), a slow (thaw).

There were, of course, those who tried to make (mischief). A (lout)ish (demagogue), an (extremist) (egotist), (devout) only in the worship of his own ambition, tried to (tout) the refugees as a (juggernaut) of invasion—to (vex) the public with fear, to (skew) compassion into (disgust). He would (oust) the foreigners, (rout) the volunteers, and make his (debut) as the republic's (stout) defender against an imagined flood. His rhetoric was a (prolix) (gust) of (bombast). But the public, after two centuries of vigilance, saw the old (despot)'s instinct beneath the (callow) (highbrow) pose. They gave his (sideshow) the (cold) shoulder it deserved, and his (debut) ended in (rout).

Beyond the crisis, ordinary life kept its round. A (cow) grazed the (fallow) field; a (sow) tended her (farrow) of piglets; a (minnow) darted in the clear stream where children played. A carpenter swept (sawdust) from his floor; a farmer worked his (flax); a craftsman set an (amethyst) in a ring. A jogger rounded the (roundabout); a boy played a (woodcut)-printing game; a (philatelist) traded stamps with a refugee child who had saved one from the ruin of home. The light caught the (convex) curve of the new well's dome and the (vertex) of the camp's tallest tent; the whole settlement seemed to (glow) at the (apex) of a hard-won hope. There was no (curfew) now, no (gust) of fear—only the (stout), (devout) peace of a people living their values outward.

The episode entered the national (annals) as a lesson in the reach of freedom. A republic, the historians wrote, proves its values not only in how it governs itself but in how it treats the stranger at its gate—whether its freedom can (subsist) as mere self-interest or extends, (devout)ly, to the persecuted beyond its borders. The (defeatist)'s closed gate and the (callow) flood were both errors; the (august) middle path was to (adjust), to (winnow) the burden without (disavow)ing the duty, to (enlist) the republic's (know-how) and (sinew) in service of the desperate. To (eschew) the refugee, the lesson ran, is to let a foreign (juggernaut) (overshadow) one's own soul.

So Velmoria, two hundred and fifteen years free, learns that the values it perfected at home must be (hallow)ed abroad—that a republic which would not (endow) the persecuted with refuge has begun to (subsist) on a (crust) of hypocrisy. The marshal made refugees of his own people and would (accost) and (rout) any who fled; the new neighboring (despot), a (juggernaut) of the same old (lust), did likewise. Velmoria's answer was the (converse)—to (winnow) the burden wisely but never (disavow) the duty, to meet the (gust) of the desperate not with (disgust) but with (devout), (stout)-hearted welcome. Two centuries and more past its own liberation, the republic learned the (apex) of its long (quest): that freedom hoarded is freedom hollowed, and that a people truly free will always (bestow), upon the stranger at the gate, the very refuge whose worth they once so dearly (avow)ed for themselves.
translation:
韦尔莫利亚与难民

*历两百一十五年，边境上汹涌而来的绝望人群，考验着一个共和国的价值观能否延伸到自身之外*

让这一章把目光投向外面。元帅倒台两百一十五年后，韦尔莫利亚面临一场它长久以来得以幸免的考验：一个邻国陷落于一股新的暴政（不可阻挡的洪流/juggernaut)，一（大批/slew）难民——逃离着外国通讯记者们（虔诚地/devout）但愿自己看错了的、一场慢动作的（浩劫/holocaust）——聚集在韦尔莫利亚的边境。这个花了两个世纪在国内臻于完善自由的共和国，如今不得不决定：它的价值观能否在自己的国界之外（存续/subsist)。

危机来得像一场（倾盆暴雨/cloudburst)。这场灾难邻国的（主角/protagonist）是一个熟悉的类型——一个（自大狂/egotist）和（自恋狂/narcissist)，一股野心的（洪流/juggernaut)，他设法（赶下台/oust）了一个脆弱的政府、把自己（猛推/thrust）上权位。他不是（随大流者/conformist)，而是最坏的那种（不随大流者/nonconformist)：一个以（淫欲/lust）和（厌憎/disgust）统治的（享乐主义/hedonist）暴君，把他的暴政裹进民族复兴那（庄严堂皇的/august）辞令里。他的子民，面对（宵禁/curfew）和恐怖，已经开始（收拾撤走/withdraw）自己仅有的那点东西出逃——一（阵/gust）人潮被吹向韦尔莫利亚（最遥远偏僻的/nethermost）边境。

难民们聚集在两国（接壤/abut）处一座蔓延开来的营地里——一座（曲折迂回的/roundabout)、由泥泞小巷和帆布（棚屋/hut）构成的迷宫，一幅流离失所者的（拼图/jigsaw)。他们来时身无长物：一位（钱币收藏家/numismatist）的一铁盒旧币、一位（集邮家/philatelist）的一本毁坏的集邮册、一位祖母（手腕/wrist）上的一枚（紫水晶/amethyst）戒指。他们靠着施舍的（面包皮/crust）和希望的（骨髓/marrow）（勉强度日/subsist)。他们既不（上前搭讪纠缠/accost）边防卫兵，也不向镜头（兜售叫卖/tout）自己的冤屈；最（稚嫩/callow）的孩子对着紧闭的大门（撅嘴/pout)，而（敦实/stout）的长者则只是等待，他们全都盼着能（知道/know)：韦尔莫利亚会（赐予/bestow）庇护，还是会（弃绝/disavow）他们。

韦尔莫利亚内部的辩论很激烈。一个（失败主义/defeatist）派系力主共和国（退缩/withdraw）回自身——（避开/eschew）这份负担、关闭边境、任凭难民自生自灭地（勉强度日/subsist)。他们坚称自己不是（极端主义者/extremist)，只是现实主义者：共和国无法在不绷紧自身（筋骨气力/sinew）的情况下，给每一个逃亡之人（赋予/endow）一个家。把他们接纳进来，就是冒着系统无法（调整/adjust）消化的（过量涌入/glut）之险。他们主张，不如把值得收留的人从其余人中（筛选/winnow）出来，只放进一小股细流，任由其余人在边境（撂荒般搁置/fallow)。

对立的派系以同等的力度陈述其理。他们主张，把绝望之人拒之门外，便是（弃绝/disavow）共和国最深层的（信条/precept)。倘若韦尔莫利亚两个世纪对自由的（追求/quest)不能通过分享自由来使之（神圣化/hallow)，那它又价值何在？（避开/eschew）这些难民，便是任由邻国那股（洪流/juggernaut）（盖过/overshadow）韦尔莫利亚自身的价值观——任由恐惧把共和国（扭曲/skew）向它的建国者曾（推翻/overthrow）的那种（稚嫩的/callow）残忍。他们不是（自命清高的/highbrow）理想主义者或（幼稚的/callow）（乐观主义者/optimist)；他们只是认定：一个不肯为受迫害者（征召/enlist）出自己力量的共和国，已经从（骨髓/marrow）里开始腐烂。

回想元帅当年是如何对待绝望之人的。他把自己的人民变成了难民，逼着他们逃离他那场残忍的（浩劫/holocaust)。他会在边境（上前纠缠拦截/accost）逃亡者，用一阵阵暴力的（狂风/gust）把他们（击溃驱散/rout)，把碍事的人（驱逐/oust）到（最遥远偏僻的/nethermost）荒原里去。他没有半根慈悲的（筋骨/sinew)，只有一个（自大狂/egotist）的（淫欲/lust）和一个（自恋狂/narcissist）对任何并非他自身之软弱的（厌憎/disgust)。在他眼里，他人的苦难是一出（杂耍小节目/sideshow)——至多是一幅给他的宣传配图的（木刻版画/woodcut)，从来算不上对他良知的一份诉求。

这个共和国被那段记忆所（惩戒警醒/chasten)，既拒绝（失败主义者/defeatist）那扇紧闭的大门，也拒绝（幼稚的/callow）（乐观主义者/optimist）那道敞开的洪流。它既不会（避开/eschew）自己的价值观，也不会假装这份负担毫无分量。通过漫长、（即兴未经准备的/impromptu）辩论——没有什么（导师/guru）的轻巧答案，没有什么（自命清高的/highbrow）公式——它锻造出一条切实可行的路径。它将接纳难民，但以有序的方式：不是要把值得收留者从不值得者中（筛选/winnow）出来（人人都值得），而是要（调整/adjust）这股人流，使共和国的（筋骨气力/sinew）不致被（耗竭/exhaust）到崩断。它将给营地（捐助/endow）切实的援助、（征召/enlist）志愿者，并（赐予/bestow）每一位难民（勉强度日/subsist)、并终有一日得以归属的机会。

这个方案绝非一场（虎头蛇尾的扫兴收场/anticlimax)。共和国把自己的（专门技能/know-how）投入到这桩事业中。一位（足病医生/podiatrist）和一位转行当医护的（分类学家/taxonomist）照料病患；一位（拳击手/pugilist）般的后勤官组织起那（漫溢的人流/overflow)；一位（打击乐手/percussionist）和一位（声乐家/vocalist）为一群群（容光焕发的/glow）疲惫孩子献上即兴音乐会。营地附近那些（撂荒的/fallow）田地用（堆肥/compost）肥沃起来、种上了庄稼；难民们得到的是尊严而非（厌憎/disgust)，开始（播种/sow）作物、重建生活。一桩本要成为灾难（洪流/juggernaut）的事，凭着耐心的（专门技能/know-how)，化作了一场缓慢的（消融解冻/thaw)。

当然，也有人试图（兴风作浪/mischief)。一个（粗鄙的/loutish）（蛊惑民心政客/demagogue)，一个（极端主义/extremist）（自大狂/egotist)，只（虔诚/devout）于崇拜自己的野心，试图把难民（鼓吹/tout）成一股入侵的（洪流/juggernaut)——用恐惧去（搅扰/vex）公众，把同情（扭曲/skew）成（厌憎/disgust)。他要（驱逐/oust）外国人、（击溃驱散/rout）志愿者，并作为共和国（敦实坚定的/stout）捍卫者、对抗一场想象出来的洪流，来一场（首次登场/debut)。他的辞令是一阵（冗长啰嗦的/prolix）（夸夸其谈/bombast）（狂风/gust)。但公众，经历两个世纪的警惕，看穿了那（稚嫩的/callow）（自命清高/highbrow）姿态底下旧（暴君/despot）的本能。他们给了他那出（杂耍小节目/sideshow）应得的（冷/cold）淡，他的（登场/debut）以（溃败/rout）收场。

危机之外，寻常生活照旧维系着它的常轨。一头（母牛/cow）在（休耕的/fallow）田里吃草；一头（母猪/sow）照料着她那（一窝/farrow）小猪崽；一条（鲦鱼/minnow）在孩子们玩耍的清澈溪流里疾游。一个木匠从地板上扫去（锯末/sawdust)；一个农夫侍弄他的（亚麻/flax)；一个匠人把一颗（紫水晶/amethyst）镶进戒指。一个慢跑者绕过那（环岛/roundabout)；一个男孩玩着（木刻/woodcut）印版游戏；一位（集邮家/philatelist）与一个从故园废墟中抢救出一枚邮票的难民孩子交换邮票。光照亮了新水井圆顶那（凸起的/convex）弧线、和营地最高那顶帐篷的（顶点/vertex)；整座定居点仿佛在一份来之不易的希望之（顶峰/apex）上（焕发光彩/glow)。如今再没有（宵禁/curfew)，没有恐惧的（狂风/gust)——只有一个把自己价值观向外践行的民族那（敦实/stout)、（虔诚的/devout）安宁。

这桩插曲作为一则关于自由之广度的教训，载入了民族（编年史/annals)。史家写道：一个共和国，证明其价值观，不只看它如何治理自己，更看它如何对待门口的陌生人——看它的自由究竟能否仅作为自利而（存续/subsist)，还是会（虔诚地/devout）延伸到国界之外那些受迫害者身上。（失败主义者/defeatist）那扇紧闭的大门、和那道（幼稚的/callow）洪流，都是错的；那（庄严的/august）中间道路，是去（调整/adjust)、是在不（弃绝/disavow）这份职责的前提下（筛选分担/winnow）这份负担、是把共和国的（专门技能/know-how）和（筋骨气力/sinew）投入到为绝望者服务之中。这教训说道：（避开/eschew）难民，便是任由一股外国的（洪流/juggernaut）（盖过/overshadow）自己的灵魂。

于是，自由了两百一十五年的韦尔莫利亚明白了：它在国内臻于完善的价值观，必须在国外也得到（神圣化/hallow)——一个不肯给受迫害者（赋予/endow）庇护的共和国，已经开始靠着一层伪善的（面包皮/crust）（苟活度日/subsist)。元帅把自己的人民变成了难民、会（拦截纠缠/accost）并（击溃/rout）任何逃亡者；那个新的邻国（暴君/despot)，一股出自同样陈旧（淫欲/lust）的（洪流/juggernaut)，也如法炮制。韦尔莫利亚的回答是（截然相反/converse）的——明智地（筛选分担/winnow）这份负担，却绝不（弃绝/disavow）这份职责，以（虔诚/devout)、（坚毅/stout）的欢迎、而非（厌憎/disgust)，去迎接那一阵绝望之人的（狂风/gust)。在它自己获得解放两个多世纪之后，这个共和国领悟到了它漫长（追求/quest）的（顶峰/apex)：被囤积的自由是被掏空的自由，而一个真正自由的民族，将永远把那份庇护——其价值他们曾经为自己如此珍重地（声言主张/avow）过——（赐予/bestow）门口的陌生人。
text:
本批词根亮点：

• amethyst：a（否定）+ methyst（醉），古希腊人相信紫水晶能防止醉酒，methanol（甲醇）同根

• juggernaut：来自梵语 Jagannath（宇宙之主），印度神车传说信徒被轧死=不可阻挡的力量

• curfew：法语 couvre+feu（盖+火），中世纪每晚敲钟提醒市民盖住炉火=宵禁

• narcissist：来自希腊神话美少年 Narcissus，爱上自己水中倒影，最终化为水仙花

• gamut：来自中世纪音乐中整个音阶的名称（gamma+ut），全音阶=全部范围

• holocaust：holo（全部）+ caust（燃烧），全部焚烧=大浩劫，caustic（腐蚀性）同根

• callow：原意是没长羽毛的雏鸟，引申为幼稚无经验的

• highbrow/lowbrow：来自颅相学，认为额头高=聪明

quiz.question: _____ philatelist
quiz.explanation: 集邮家, 邮票集邮家. The stamp philatelist collected rare postage items. 邮票集邮家收集稀有邮政物品。 | philos->热爱，atelia->免税（希腊，ateleia->免邮费），philatelist->热爱免费邮票的人=集邮家（cf. philosophy哲学，philanthropy慈善）

quiz.question: pugilist ________
quiz.explanation: 拳击手, 拳击冠军. The pugilist champion defended his title successfully. 拳击冠军成功卫冕。 | pugil->拳击手（拉丁pugnus->拳头），pugilist->用拳头战斗的人=拳击手（cf. pugnacious好斗，impugn质疑，repugnant令人厌恶）

quiz.question: enlist _______
quiz.explanation: 征募; 争取, 争取支持. The campaign will enlist support from local businesses. 该活动将争取当地企业的支持。 | en->使，list->名单，enlist->把名字列入名单=征募/争取（cf. list列表，enroll注册，conscript征召，recruit招募）

quiz.question: _______ extremist
quiz.explanation: 极端主义者, 暴力极端主义者. The violent extremist was arrested by authorities. 暴力极端主义者被当局逮捕。 | extrem->极端（拉丁extremus->最外端的），extremist->持极端立场的人（cf. extreme极端，external外部，exterior外面）

quiz.question: ____ optimist
quiz.explanation: 乐观主义者, 天生的乐观主义者. She is a born optimist who sees the bright side. 她是一个天生的乐观主义者,总看到光明的一面。 | optim->最好（拉丁optimus），optimist->相信事情最好的人=乐观主义者（cf. optimal最优，optimize优化，optimum最佳）

quiz.question: _____ taxonomist
quiz.explanation: 分类学家, 植物分类学家. The plant taxonomist identified new species. 植物分类学家鉴定了新物种。 | taxo->排列（希腊taxis），nom->法则，taxonomist->按法则排列的学者=分类学家（cf. taxonomy分类学，syntax句法，tactics战术）

quiz.question: ______ conformist
quiz.explanation: 墨守成规者, 社会墨守成规者. The social conformist follows all societal norms. 社会墨守成规者遵循所有社会规范。 | con->共同，form->形式，conformist->跟随共同形式的人=循规蹈矩者（cf. reform改革，transform转变，inform通知）

quiz.question: ______ nonconformist
quiz.explanation: 不墨守成规者, 社会不墨守成规者. The social nonconformist rejected traditional values. 社会不墨守成规者拒绝传统价值观。 | non->否定，conformist->循规蹈矩者，nonconformist->不循规蹈矩的人（cf. noncommittal不表态，nonplussed困惑的）

quiz.question: hedonist _________
quiz.explanation: 享乐主义者, 享乐主义生活方式. He pursued a hedonist lifestyle focused on pleasure. 他追求以快乐为中心的享乐主义生活方式。 | hedone->快乐（希腊），hedonist->追求快乐的人（cf. anhedonia无法感受快乐，hedonism享乐主义）

quiz.question: _____ protagonist
quiz.explanation: 主角; 主要人物, 故事主角. The story protagonist overcomes many obstacles. 故事主角克服了许多障碍。 | proto->第一（希腊），agon->竞争，protagonist->第一竞争者=主角（cf. antagonist对手，agony痛苦，agonize煎熬）

quiz.question: ____ percussionist
quiz.explanation: 打击乐器演奏者, 爵士打击乐器演奏者. The jazz percussionist kept perfect rhythm. 爵士打击乐器演奏者保持完美的节奏。 | per->彻底，cuss->打击（拉丁quatere），percussionist->用打击乐演奏的人（cf. concussion脑震荡，percussion打击乐，repercussion影响）

quiz.question: podiatrist ______
quiz.explanation: 足病医生, 足病医生诊所. The podiatrist clinic treats foot problems. 足病医生诊所治疗足部问题。 | pod->脚（希腊pous），iatrist->医生，podiatrist->治疗脚的医生（cf. podium讲台=站脚的，tripod三脚架，pediatrician儿科医生）

quiz.question: wrist _____
quiz.explanation: 手腕, 腕表. He wore an expensive wrist watch. 他戴着昂贵的腕表。 | wrist->手腕（古英语wrǣst->扭），wrist->可以扭转的关节=手腕（cf. wrest夺取，wrestle摔跤，wring拧）

quiz.question: subsist __ ____
quiz.explanation: 生存; 维持生活, 靠大米生存. Poor farmers subsist on rice and vegetables. 贫困农民靠大米和蔬菜生存。 | sub->在下，sist->站立，subsist->在最基本层面上站立=维持生存（cf. consist由...组成，persist坚持，resist抵制，insist坚持）

quiz.question: ____-________ narcissist
quiz.explanation: 自恋者, 自我陶醉的自恋者. The self-absorbed narcissist only cared about himself. 自我陶醉的自恋者只关心自己。 | Narcissus->希腊神话中爱上自己倒影的美少年，narcissist->爱上自己倒影的人=自恋者（cf. narcissism自恋，narcotic麻醉）

quiz.question: defeatist ________
quiz.explanation: 失败主义的; 失败主义者, 失败主义态度. His defeatist attitude prevented him from trying. 他的失败主义态度阻止了他尝试。 | defeat->失败，ist->人，defeatist->相信失败不可避免的人（cf. defeat失败，defeat拆除=de+feat，defeatism失败主义）

quiz.question: ____ numismatist
quiz.explanation: 钱币收藏家, 热心的钱币收藏家. The keen numismatist collected ancient coins. 热心的钱币收藏家收集古钱币。 | numisma->硬币（希腊，来自nomos->法定），numismatist->收集硬币的人=钱币收藏家（cf. numeral数字，numerous众多）

quiz.question: ____-________ egotist
quiz.explanation: 自我中心者, 自我中心的自我中心者. The self-centered egotist talked only about himself. 自我中心的自我中心者只谈论自己。 | ego->自我（拉丁），ist->人，egotist->以自我为中心的人（cf. egocentric自我中心，alter ego另一个自我，ego弗洛伊德的自我）

quiz.question: accost _ ________
quiz.explanation: 搭讪; 勾引, 搭讪路人. A stranger tried to accost a passerby on the street. 一个陌生人试图在街上搭讪路人。 | ac->朝向，cost->肋骨/侧面（拉丁costa），accost->靠近侧面接触=搭讪（cf. coast海岸，accost旁边接近）

quiz.question: nethermost _______
quiz.explanation: 最低的; 最深的, 最深的区域. They explored the nethermost regions of the cave. 他们探索了洞穴最深的区域。 | nether->下面（古英语nioðer），most->最，nethermost->最下面的（cf. neither既不，Netherlands荷兰=低地国，nether regions地下）

quiz.question: compost ____
quiz.explanation: 堆肥, 堆肥堆. The garden has a compost heap for organic waste. 花园有一个堆肥堆用于有机废物。 | com->共同，post->放置（拉丁ponere），compost->放在一起腐烂的=堆肥（cf. compose作曲/构成，compose=put together）

quiz.question: ______ cloudburst
quiz.explanation: 暴雨; 突然大雨, 突然暴雨. A sudden cloudburst flooded the streets. 突然暴雨淹没了街道。 | cloud->云，burst->爆裂，cloudburst->云爆裂倾泻=暴雨（cf. outburst爆发，sunburst阳光突现，cloudburst比downpour更猛烈）

quiz.question: _______ holocaust
quiz.explanation: 大屠杀; 浩劫, 核浩劫. Scientists warned of a nuclear holocaust. 科学家警告核浩劫。 | holo->全部（希腊），caust->燃烧（希腊kaiein），holocaust->全部焚烧=大浩劫（cf. holograph全息，caustic腐蚀性的，cauterize灼烧）

quiz.question: exhaust _________
quiz.explanation: 耗尽; 使疲惫, 耗尽资源. Do not exhaust resources through wasteful practices. 不要通过浪费行为耗尽资源。 | ex->向外，haust->抽取（拉丁haurire），exhaust->向外抽尽=耗尽（cf. exhaustive彻底的，exhaustion精疲力竭，inexhaustible取之不尽）

quiz.question: __ bust
quiz.explanation: 破产; 半身像, 破产. The company will go bust without new funding. 没有新资金,公司将破产。 | bust->爆裂/破产（burst的变体），go bust->像气球一样爆裂=破产（cf. burst爆裂，boom繁荣，boom and bust经济周期）

quiz.question: locust _____
quiz.explanation: 蝗虫, 蝗虫群. A locust swarm destroyed the crops. 蝗虫群摧毁了庄稼。 | locust->蝗虫（拉丁locusta），locust->大规模破坏的蝗虫（cf. lobster龙虾=大型海洋蝗虫，locust年=蝗灾之年）

quiz.question: sawdust _____
quiz.explanation: 锯末, 锯末地板. The workshop had a sawdust floor. 车间有锯末地板。 | saw->锯，dust->粉尘，sawdust->锯木产生的粉尘=锯末（cf. saw锯子，dusty满是灰尘的，dust尘埃）

quiz.question: gust __ ____
quiz.explanation: 阵风, 一阵风. A strong gust of wind blew the door open. 一阵强风吹开了门。 | gust->喷出（古挪威gustr->冷风），gust->一阵风（cf. gusto热情=一阵热风，disgust厌恶，robust强壮）

quiz.question: ____ disgust
quiz.explanation: 厌恶; 反感, 感到厌恶. The cruel behavior made people feel disgust. 残忍的行为使人们感到厌恶。 | dis->否定，gust->口味（拉丁gustus），disgust->失去口味=厌恶（cf. gusto热情，taste口味，distaste厌恶，gustatory味觉的）

quiz.question: august ________
quiz.explanation: 威严的; 令人敬畏的, 威严的存在. The king had an august presence. 国王有威严的存在。 | augustus->威严（拉丁augere->增长），august->令人肃然起敬的=威严（cf. augment增加，augur占卜，inauguration就职，August八月=奥古斯都月）

quiz.question: adjust ________
quiz.explanation: 调整; 适应, 调整设置. Please adjust settings to your preferences. 请根据您的偏好调整设置。 | ad->朝向，just->正确（拉丁justus），adjust->使变得正确=调整（cf. just公正，justice正义，justify证明正确，maladjusted适应不良）

quiz.question: lust ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 渴望; 色欲, 对权力的渴望. His lust for power corrupted him completely. 他对权力的渴望完全腐蚀了他。 | lust->欲望（古英语lust->快乐/欲望），lust->强烈欲望（cf. lusty强壮的，list->古英语的倾向/欲望，listless无精打采）

quiz.question: wanderlust ______
quiz.explanation: 旅行癖; 漫游癖, 漫游精神. She possessed a wanderlust spirit and traveled widely. 她拥有漫游精神,广泛旅行。 | wandern->漫游（德语），lust->渴望，wanderlust->渴望漫游=旅行癖（cf. wander漫游，wonder惊奇，lust渴望）

quiz.question: oust ____ ______
quiz.explanation: 驱逐; 罢免, 从职位上罢免. The board voted to oust from office the CEO. 董事会投票将首席执行官从职位上罢免。 | oust->驱逐（古法语oster->除去），oust->从职位驱逐=罢免（cf. exhaust耗尽，robust强壮，ousting罢免）

quiz.question: _____'_ crust
quiz.explanation: 外壳; 地壳, 地壳. The earths crust is relatively thin. 地壳相对较薄。 | crust->外壳（拉丁crusta->硬壳），crust->坚硬的外层（cf. crusade十字军=穿着十字徽记，encrust包裹，crustacean甲壳动物）

quiz.question: thrust _______
quiz.explanation: 推; 刺, 向前推进. The army will thrust forward into enemy territory. 军队将向前推进到敌方领土。 | thrust->猛推（古挪威þrysta->压），thrust->用力推进（cf. throb跳动，throbbing轰鸣，cf. thrust=推进力）

quiz.question: amethyst ________
quiz.explanation: 紫水晶, 紫水晶项链. She wore a beautiful amethyst necklace. 她戴着一条美丽的紫水晶项链。 | a->否定，methyst->醉（希腊methyein->喝醉），amethyst->防醉的宝石（古人相信紫水晶能防止醉酒，cf. methanol甲醇，intoxicate使醉）

quiz.question: ___ ___ butt
quiz.explanation: 臀部; 烟蒂, 击中靶心. The archer will hit the butt with precision. 弓箭手将精确地击中靶心。 | butt->端/把手/靶（古法语but->目标），butt->靶心/笑柄（cf. butt接触，butt in插嘴，buttress支撑=靠着边，scapegoat替罪羊）

quiz.question: _________ juggernaut
quiz.explanation: 不可阻挡的力量, 企业巨头. The corporate juggernaut dominates the market. 企业巨头主导市场。 | Jagannath->宇宙之主（梵语，印度神名），juggernaut->信徒被神车轧死的传说=不可阻挡的力量（cf. jugular颈静脉，cf. Juggernaut神车）

quiz.question: abut ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 邻接; 毗连, 毗邻河流. Their property will abut the river on one side. 他们的财产一侧将毗邻河流。 | a->朝向，but->端（古法语bout->末端），abut->以端部接触=邻接（cf. butt末端，abutment桥台，adjacent毗邻）

quiz.question: _____ debut
quiz.explanation: 初次登台; 首次亮相, 舞台首演. The actress made her stage debut at age 20. 女演员在20岁时首次登台演出。 | de->去除，but->目标（法语but），debut->朝目标出发=首次亮相（注意t不发音，cf. debute->de-buter去掉障碍首次出场）

quiz.question: woodcut _____
quiz.explanation: 木刻; 木版画, 木刻版画. The museum displays ancient woodcut print. 博物馆展示古代木刻版画。 | wood->木，cut->切，woodcut->木头上切刻的图案=木版画（cf. woodwork木工，shortcut捷径，cut-throat激烈竞争）

quiz.question: undercut ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 削价竞争; 削弱, 削价. Competitors will undercut the price to win customers. 竞争对手会削价以赢得客户。 | under->在下，cut->切，undercut->从下面切=削减价格（cf. undermine削弱，undercut竞争中压低价格）

quiz.question: ________ hut
quiz.explanation: 小屋; 棚屋, 山间小屋. Hikers rested in the mountain hut overnight. 徒步旅行者在山间小屋过夜休息。 | hut->小屋（法语hutte->棚屋），hut->简陋的小棚（cf. hutch兔窝，hovel陋屋，shelter庇护所）

quiz.question: ____ glut
quiz.explanation: 过剩; 供过于求, 食物过剩. The harvest created a food glut in the market. 丰收在市场上造成了食物过剩。 | glut->吞咽（拉丁gluttire），glut->吞得过多=过剩（cf. glutton暴食者，gluttony暴食，swallow吞咽，gullet食道）

quiz.question: ____ gamut
quiz.explanation: 全部; 整个范围, 全部范围. The exhibition runs the full gamut of modern art. 展览涵盖了现代艺术的全部范围。 | gamut->音阶全范围（中世纪音乐gamma+ut，整个音阶），gamut->全部范围（cf. gamma希腊字母，scale音阶，full gamut全部范围）

quiz.question: ______ bout
quiz.explanation: 回合; 一场, 拳击比赛. The boxing bout lasted twelve rounds. 拳击比赛持续了十二回合。 | bout->转（古法语bouter->推），bout->一个回合的比赛（cf. about关于=在周围，button纽扣=推进，debate辩论）

quiz.question: roundabout _____
quiz.explanation: 环形交叉路; 迂回的, 迂回路线. We took a roundabout route to avoid traffic. 我们走迂回路线以避免交通拥堵。 | round->圆，about->关于/在周围，roundabout->绕着圆圈转=环形交叉路/迂回的（cf. circle圆，rotary环形道）

quiz.question: _______ lout
quiz.explanation: 粗人; 笨蛋, 粗鲁的粗人. The boorish lout offended everyone at the party. 粗鲁的粗人冒犯了聚会上的每个人。 | lout->笨拙者（古英语lutan->弯腰），lout->笨拙粗鲁的人（cf. oaf笨蛋，boor粗人，loutish粗鲁的）

quiz.question: pout ____
quiz.explanation: 撅嘴; 生气, 撅起嘴唇. Children often pout lips when disappointed. 孩子们失望时常常撅起嘴唇。 | pout->撅嘴（中古英语pouten->突出），pout->嘴唇突出=撅嘴（cf. spout喷出，sprout发芽，clout影响力）

quiz.question: _ rout
quiz.explanation: 溃败; 彻底击败, 一场溃败. The battle ended in a rout of the enemy. 战斗以敌人的溃败告终。 | rout->溃败（古法语route->道路被打开），rout->敌军溃逃（cf. route路线，routine常规，disrupt扰乱）

quiz.question: tout _ _______
quiz.explanation: 兜售; 吹捧, 兜售产品. Advertisers tout a product as revolutionary. 广告商兜售产品称其具有革命性。 | tout->四处张望（古英语tutan->探望），tout->四处张望招揽顾客=兜售（cf. touter招揽者，toot吹号，tout张扬）

quiz.question: stout _____
quiz.explanation: 粗壮的; 结实的, 结实的体格. The wrestler had a stout build. 摔跤手有结实的体格。 | stout->骄傲/强壮（古法语estout->大胆），stout->结实粗壮（cf. stalwart坚定，robust强壮，sturdy结实，stout啤酒）

quiz.question: devout ________
quiz.explanation: 虔诚的, 虔诚的信徒. She is a devout believer who prays daily. 她是一位每天祈祷的虔诚信徒。 | de->完全，vout->誓愿（拉丁votum），devout->完全发誓奉献的=虔诚的（cf. vow誓言，vote投票，devote奉献，devotion奉献）

quiz.question: ____ plateau
quiz.explanation: 高原; 平稳期, 高原. The high plateau stretches for miles. 高原绵延数英里。 | plat->平坦（法语，拉丁platus），plateau->平坦的高地=高原（注意au不发音，cf. plate盘子，platform平台，flat平坦）

quiz.question: _____ purlieu
quiz.explanation: 范围; 郊区, 乡村地区. They lived in the rural purlieu outside the city. 他们住在城市外的乡村地区。 | pur->通过，lieu->地方（法语），purlieu->通过的地方=周边地区（cf. lieu代替，lieutenant副官=代位者，milieu环境=中间地方）

quiz.question: ____ guru
quiz.explanation: 大师; 权威, 技术大师. The tech guru founded several startups. 技术大师创立了几家初创公司。 | guru->重的/有分量的（梵语，来自Sanskrit guru），guru->有分量的老师=大师（cf. grave严肃/重的，gravitas庄严，gravity重力）

quiz.question: impromptu ______
quiz.explanation: 即兴的, 即兴演讲. She delivered an impromptu speech at the event. 她在活动中发表了即兴演讲。 | in->否定，promptu->提示（拉丁in promptu->随时准备着），impromptu->没有事先准备的=即兴的（cf. prompt提示，prompter提词员）

quiz.question: ______ thaw
quiz.explanation: 解冻; 融化, 春季解冻. The spring thaw melts the snow. 春季解冻融化了雪。 | thaw->融化（古英语þawian），thaw->冰雪融化（cf. thaw out解冻，political thaw政治解冻，thaw=melt融化）

quiz.question: _____ flaw
quiz.explanation: 缺陷; 瑕疵, 致命缺陷. The plan had a fatal flaw that doomed it. 该计划有一个注定失败的致命缺陷。 | flaw->裂缝（古挪威flaga->薄片），flaw->破裂处=缺陷（cf. flaw缺陷，flawed有缺陷的，flawless无瑕疵的）

quiz.question: withdraw ____
quiz.explanation: 取出; 撤回, 取现金. You can withdraw cash from the ATM. 你可以从自动取款机取现金。 | with->反向，draw->拉，withdraw->向反方向拉=取出/撤回（cf. withstand抵抗，withhold扣留，draw拉）

quiz.question: jigsaw ______
quiz.explanation: 拼图, 拼图游戏. Children enjoy solving jigsaw puzzle. 孩子们喜欢解拼图游戏。 | jig->上下跳动，saw->锯，jigsaw->上下抖动的锯=曲线锯（切出不规则拼图形状，cf. jigsaw blade曲线锯片）

quiz.question: yaw _____
quiz.explanation: 偏航, 偏航误差. The pilot corrected the yaw error. 飞行员纠正了偏航误差。 | yaw->偏航（古挪威jaga->摇摆），yaw->船/飞机偏离航线（cf. pitch俯仰，roll滚动，yaw偏航=飞行三轴运动）

quiz.question: ____ curfew
quiz.explanation: 宵禁, 城市宵禁. The city curfew begins at midnight. 城市宵禁从午夜开始。 | couvre->盖（法语），feu->火，curfew->盖住火=宵禁（中世纪每晚敲钟提醒市民熄灭炉火，cf. cover覆盖，focus炉火）

quiz.question: eschew ________
quiz.explanation: 避免; 戒绝, 避免暴力. Peaceful protesters eschew violence completely. 和平抗议者完全避免暴力。 | eschew->回避（古高德语sciuhan->害怕），eschew->刻意回避（cf. shy害羞，shun回避，skew偏斜）

quiz.question: skew ____
quiz.explanation: 歪斜; 扭曲, 扭曲数据. Bias can skew data in research studies. 偏见会扭曲研究中的数据。 | skew->歪斜（古挪威skeifr->斜），skew->使偏斜（cf. askew歪斜的，oblique斜的，eschew回避）

quiz.question: _ slew __ ______
quiz.explanation: 大量; 许多, 大量订单. The company received a slew of orders. 公司收到了大量订单。 | slew->大批（爱尔兰语slua->人群），a slew of->大量的（cf. slew杀死->slay的过去式，two meanings）

quiz.question: ______ sinew
quiz.explanation: 肌腱; 力量, 肌肉肌腱. The athletes muscle sinew was well developed. 运动员的肌肉肌腱发育良好。 | sinew->筋/肌腱（古英语sinu），sinew->力量的来源（cf. sinewy强健的，the sinews of war战争的资源，nerve神经）

quiz.question: _______ ___ screw
quiz.explanation: 螺丝, 拧紧螺丝. Use a screwdriver to tighten the screw. 用螺丝刀拧紧螺丝。 | screw->螺丝（法语escroue->螺帽），screw->螺旋形的紧固件（cf. screw拧，unscrew拆开，corkscrew开瓶器）

quiz.question: elbow ____
quiz.explanation: 肘部, 活动空间. The small office provides little elbow room. 小办公室几乎没有活动空间。 | el->前臂，bow->弯（古英语elboga），elbow->手臂的弯曲处=肘（cf. bow弯曲，elbow one's way用肘挤路，elbow room活动空间）

quiz.question: cow ____ _______
quiz.explanation: 威吓; 恐吓, 威吓使沉默. Threats cannot cow into silence brave journalists. 威胁无法威吓勇敢的记者使其沉默。 | cow->恐吓（古挪威kúga->压制），cow->把人压制=威吓（注意与cow母牛无关，cf. intimidate恐吓，bully欺凌）

quiz.question: foreshadow ______
quiz.explanation: 预示; 预兆, 预示事件. Dark clouds foreshadow events of the storm. 乌云预示风暴事件。 | fore->提前，shadow->影子，foreshadow->提前投下影子=预示（cf. shadow影子，shadow boxing空击，overshadow压倒）

quiz.question: overshadow ____________
quiz.explanation: 使黯然失色; 遮蔽, 使成就黯然失色. Do not let failure overshadow achievements. 不要让失败使成就黯然失色。 | over->在上，shadow->影子，overshadow->从上面投下影子=使黯然失色（cf. shadow影子，foreshadow预示，shade阴影）

quiz.question: endow ____
quiz.explanation: 捐赠; 赋予, 捐赠基金. The philanthropist will endow fund for scholarships. 慈善家将为奖学金捐赠基金。 | en->使，dow->给予（古英语dagian->给嫁妆），endow->给予财产=捐赠（cf. dowry嫁妆，endowment捐赠，widow寡妇）

quiz.question: _________ know-how
quiz.explanation: 专门技术; 实践知识, 技术诀窍. Engineers possess technical know-how. 工程师拥有技术诀窍。 | know->知道，how->如何，know-how->知道如何做=诀窍（cf. know-how实践知识，expertise专业知识，skill技能）

quiz.question: ________ sideshow
quiz.explanation: 杂耍; 附属活动, 嘉年华杂耍. The carnival sideshow attracted curious crowds. 嘉年华杂耍吸引了好奇的人群。 | side->旁边，show->表演，sideshow->旁边的附属表演=杂耍（cf. showcase展示，showdown摊牌，sideline边线/旁观）

quiz.question: overflow ____
quiz.explanation: 溢出; 泛滥, 溢流罐. The overflow tank collects excess water. 溢流罐收集多余的水。 | over->超过，flow->流，overflow->流过头=溢出（cf. overflowing满溢，overflow of emotions情绪溢出，underflow潜流）

quiz.question: ____ glow
quiz.explanation: 发光; 光辉, 柔和的光辉. Candles cast a soft glow in the room. 蜡烛在房间里投射出柔和的光辉。 | glow->发光（古英语glowan），glow->温暖发光（cf. glowing赞美的/发光的，afterglow余晖，radiate辐射）

quiz.question: callow _____
quiz.explanation: 未成熟的; 无经验的, 未成熟的青年. The callow youth lacked worldly experience. 未成熟的青年缺乏世俗经验。 | callow->秃（古英语calu->没有羽毛），callow->没长羽毛的雏鸟=幼稚无经验的（cf. bald秃头，callow youth乳臭未干的年轻人）

quiz.question: fallow _____
quiz.explanation: 休耕的; 荒芜的, 休耕田地. The farmer left the fallow field to recover. 农民让休耕田地恢复。 | fallow->淡黄（古英语fealu->淡黄色），fallow->颜色如休耕地的枯黄=休耕（cf. fellow伙伴=同一块地的人，follow跟随，fallow land休耕地）

quiz.question: hallow ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 使神圣; 尊崇, 使土地神圣. They will hallow the ground with a ceremony. 他们将用仪式使土地神圣。 | hallow->神圣（古英语halig->圣），hallow->使神圣（cf. Halloween万圣节前夕=圣者之夜，holy神圣，hallowed神圣的土地）

quiz.question: minnow ____
quiz.explanation: 小鱼; 小人物, 小鱼池塘. The minnow pond teems with tiny fish. 小鱼池塘里到处都是小鱼。 | minnow->小鱼（中古英语menow），minnow->极小的鱼/小人物（cf. big fish in a small pond大池塘里的小鱼，小池里的大鱼）

quiz.question: winnow ____
quiz.explanation: 筛选; 扬谷, 筛选数据. Researchers must winnow data to find patterns. 研究人员必须筛选数据以找到模式。 | winnow->扬谷（古英语windwian->用风吹），winnow->用风吹去谷壳=筛选（cf. wind风，window窗户=风眼，winnowing扬谷）

quiz.question: highbrow _______
quiz.explanation: 知识分子的; 高雅的, 高雅文化. The magazine covers highbrow culture and arts. 该杂志涵盖高雅文化和艺术。 | high->高，brow->眉毛/额头，highbrow->额头高=知识分子（颅相学认为额头高=聪明，cf. lowbrow通俗，middlebrow中等）

quiz.question: overthrow _ ______
quiz.explanation: 推翻; 打倒, 推翻政权. Rebels attempted to overthrow a regime. 叛军试图推翻政权。 | over->超过，throw->投掷，overthrow->向外投掷推翻=推翻（cf. throwback倒退，throw light on阐明，overthrow推翻政权）

quiz.question: farrow _ ______
quiz.explanation: 产仔, 产一窝仔. The sow will farrow a litter in spring. 母猪将在春天产一窝仔。 | farrow->一窝猪仔（古英语fearh->小猪），farrow->母猪产仔（cf. farrow母猪产仔，cf. feral野生，litter一窝幼崽/垃圾）

quiz.question: harrow ___ _____
quiz.explanation: 耙地; 折磨, 耙地. Farmers harrow the field before planting. 农民在种植前耙地。 | harrow->耙（古英语hærwe），harrow->用耙耕地/使痛苦（cf. harrowing令人痛苦的，harrow耙地，Halloween=harrowing night）

quiz.question: ____ marrow
quiz.explanation: 骨髓; 精髓, 骨髓. Bone marrow produces blood cells. 骨髓产生血细胞。 | marrow->髓（古英语mearg），marrow->骨髓/精髓（cf. vegetable marrow西葫芦，chilled to the marrow透心凉，marrow of a matter精髓）

quiz.question: sow _____
quiz.explanation: 播种, 播种种子. Spring is the time to sow seeds. 春天是播种种子的时候。 | sow->播种（古英语sawan），sow seeds->播下种子（cf. sow播种=sow the seeds of discord播下争端的种子，reap收获）

quiz.question: bestow _____
quiz.explanation: 授予; 给予, 授予荣誉. The university will bestow honor on the graduate. 大学将授予毕业生荣誉。 | be->使，stow->放置，bestow->把某物放置给某人=授予（cf. stow收放，stowage货物放置，stow away偷乘）

quiz.question: avow _____
quiz.explanation: 承认; 公开宣称, 承认罪责. The defendant chose to avow guilt. 被告选择承认罪责。 | a->朝向，vow->誓言（拉丁votum），avow->公开发誓=公开承认（cf. vow誓言，devout虔诚，avowed公开的）

quiz.question: disavow _________
quiz.explanation: 否认; 拒绝承认, 否认知情. The official will disavow knowledge of the scandal. 官员将否认知情这起丑闻。 | dis->否定，avow->承认，disavow->否认承认=拒绝承认（cf. avow承认，disown断绝关系，deny否认）

quiz.question: flax _____
quiz.explanation: 亚麻, 亚麻纤维. Linen is made from flax fiber. 亚麻布由亚麻纤维制成。 | flax->亚麻（古英语fleax），flax->亚麻植物（cf. linen亚麻布，flaxen淡黄色，flexible柔软=像亚麻一样）

quiz.question: _____ _ climax
quiz.explanation: 高潮; 顶点, 达到高潮. The tension will reach a climax in the final act. 紧张气氛将在最后一幕达到高潮。 | climax->梯子（希腊klimax->梯子），climax->爬到最高点=高潮（cf. climb攀爬，climate气候=倾斜的太阳，acclimate适应气候）

quiz.question: ____ anticlimax
quiz.explanation: 反高潮; 虎头蛇尾, 情节反高潮. The ending was a disappointing plot anticlimax. 结局是令人失望的情节反高潮。 | anti->对抗，climax->高潮，anticlimax->高潮的对立=反高潮/虎头蛇尾（cf. climax高潮，anticlimactic令人失望的）

quiz.question: ________ apex
quiz.explanation: 顶点; 最高点, 山顶. Climbers reached the mountain apex at noon. 登山者在中午到达山顶。 | apex->顶点（拉丁，帽子的顶端），apex->最高点（cf. apogee最远点，aphelion远日点，cf. apex predator顶级捕食者）

quiz.question: ________ vertex
quiz.explanation: 顶点; 角的顶点, 三角形顶点. The triangle vertex is labeled point A. 三角形顶点标记为A点。 | vert->转（拉丁vertere），vertex->旋转的顶端=顶点（cf. vortex漩涡，vertical垂直，vertigo眩晕=旋转感）

quiz.question: vex ___ ______
quiz.explanation: 使烦恼; 使恼怒, 使公众烦恼. The controversy will vex the public for months. 这场争议将使公众烦恼数月。 | vex->骚扰（拉丁vexare->摇晃），vex->使烦恼（cf. vexation烦恼，vexatious令人烦恼的，vexed question棘手问题）

quiz.question: convex ______
quiz.explanation: 凸的; 凸面的, 凸面镜. The convex mirror provides a wide view. 凸面镜提供广阔的视野。 | con->共同，vex->拱起（拉丁vehere->携带），convex->向外拱起的=凸的（cf. concave凹面，convex凸面，excavate挖掘）

quiz.question: prolix ______
quiz.explanation: 冗长的; 啰嗦的, 冗长的演讲. His prolix speech bored the audience. 他冗长的演讲使观众感到厌烦。 | pro->向前，lix->流动（拉丁liqui），prolix->话语像水一样流个不停=冗长的（cf. liquid液体，liquor酒，prolixity啰嗦）
